analysis.reasoning: The tweet highlights the EU's use of its Global Human Rights Sanctions Regime to punish rights violators in Russia, framing the EU as a proactive regulator and global actor defending human rights. This aligns with: EU4 (avant-garde political actor) through regulatory leadership; EU5 (global champion of fair causes) by promoting and defending human rights; and EU6 (contributes to a better world) by advancing global well-being through sanctions-based accountability.
